plainEnglishDefinitions.plain: A program that adds another program to your computer.
Remove a program from a computer.

realJobUses: Install approved software and remove unwanted apps
analogies: An installer is like a setup guide putting tools into the right drawers.
handsOnTasks: Install an app and confirm it appears in Start Menu
breakFixTasks: Handle SmartScreen block or missing uninstaller
automationOpportunities: Silent install after understanding manual install
